title: Malaysian Crumble Fritters
description: A twist on traditional crumble, these fritters combine the flavors of Malaysia with a crunchy texture. Perfect as a snack or side dish.

ingredients.name: Malaysian fermented soybean paste (Petai or Belacan)

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the chopped fermented vegetables and onion.
Add the Malaysian fermented soybean paste and mix well.
In a separate bowl, crush the crumbled crackers into fine crumbs.
Add the cracker crumbs to the vegetable mixture and stir until well combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties or fritters.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
When the oil is hot, add the fritters and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve the fritters hot and enjoy!
